bugs.description: autofix.py _visual_len counts English chars equally to Korean, causing English-dominant titles to be truncated at Korean char limits. English chars are ~half the width of Korean.
bugs.fix: _korean_ratio() < 0.3 guard skips truncation for English-dominant text
bugs.prevention_rule: Never truncate text where Korean characters are <30% of total alphanumeric characters

bugs.description: Sparse slide check exempts by position (slide 01 and last slide) instead of by content type. If slide numbering changes, exemption breaks.
bugs.prevention_rule: Use content-type detection (is_cover field) not position-based exemption

bugs.description: content-writer compresses SPEC data by deleting it instead of fitting it. Margins, operating frequency, competitive positioning lost. SPEC utilization ~30% when 70%+ needed for consulting decks.
bugs.fix: Added SPEC Utilization rules to content-writer.md (70%+ target)
bugs.prevention_rule: Every number in SPEC must appear in slide-content.json. If layout can't fit, add callout/source field or split slide.

bugs.description: slide-planner defaults to three-column-stats for any slide with numbers, causing 22-35% of deck to use identical layout. No layout diversity check at planning time.
bugs.fix: Added dense layouts (annotated-table, stat-table-hybrid, matrix, waterfall, chart-commentary) and layout_rules enforcement to slide-planner.md
bugs.prevention_rule: No single layout type may exceed max_same_layout_pct% of slides. Default to denser layouts when SPEC has >5 data points.

bugs.description: Critic awarded 8/10 while slides had 55-65% empty space and zero charts. No mandatory deduction for information sparseness or missing visual variety.
bugs.fix: Added decision_readiness axis, mandatory deductions for empty space >50%, zero charts, and layout repetition >25%
bugs.prevention_rule: Slides with >50% empty space get info_density -0.5. Zero visual elements in 10+ slide deck gets info_density -1.

bugs.description: Recurring error (3x across iterations 6-6): Title truncated to 'Future AI Lea...' — appears incomplete, not intentional
bugs.prevention_rule: Auto-promoted from error registry. Needs manual fix in validate.py.

bugs.description: Recurring error (7x across iterations 6-6): Bottom 30% still empty below callout — callout at ~55% height leaves dead space
bugs.prevention_rule: Auto-promoted from error registry. Needs manual fix in slides.py.

bugs.description: Recurring error (3x across iterations 6-6): Source '2026-03-28 파일럿 확정' is at FONT_CAPTION (tiny) — unreadable at 3m
bugs.prevention_rule: Auto-promoted from error registry. Needs manual fix in unknown.

bugs.description: deck-critic.md formula 'overall = round(sum/8)' with 1-5 per-axis scores produces max overall = round(40/8) = 5/10. But score ceiling doc says 9/10 is max. Previous 7-axis version produced scores up to 9/10 using a different (undocumented) scale. The formula and the ceiling are inconsistent.
bugs.prevention_rule: If target threshold is 9/10, use one of: (a) score each axis 1-10 scale, (b) use formula round(sum/8 * 2) to scale to 2-10 range, (c) keep 1-5 per axis but use formula round(sum/4) for 0-10 range. Document chosen formula explicitly.
